case_title: WILBUR L. JUNG VS. TONY MAN et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUNG, WILBUR L. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT MAN, TONY AKA KWOK K. T. MAN

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUNG, WILBUR L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAN, TONY AKA KWOK K. T. MAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1886 32ND AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $7,353.28 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,353.28, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS DAILY DAMAGES AT $32.25 COMMENCING ON THE DAY OF DEFENDANT'S BREACH UNTIL PLAINTIFF REGAINS POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUNG, WILBUR L. AS TO DEFENDANT MAN, TONY AKA KWOK K. T. MAN DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR JUDGMENT PURSUANT SETTLEMENT STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT BASED ON DEFENDANT'S DEFAULT, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUNG, WILBUR L.
